text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 35 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: Up to 35 positive integers 

COMMENT: Field length expanded from 15 to 35 in 2025. Historically, a single individual prescriber might have had 
more than one type of identifier, and the PDEs that he/she prescribed may have more than one 
PRSCRBR_ID (e.g., the NPI could have appeared on some PDEs and the DEA number on others). The 
PRSCRBR_ID usually represents a unique individual prescriber (i.e., a prescribing provider), but can 
occasionally represent
